description_en: A tangible cultural property, a historical material: the portable shrine (mikoshi) of Yasaka Shrine. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1995-06-30. It is located in Ōhira-machi Nishiyamada, within the Ōhira History and Folklore Museum, Tochigi City.

A tangible cultural property, a historical material: a stone monument inscribed with a Man'yō poem (kahi). It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1969-07-01. It is located in Fujioka-machi Ōtawa, Tochigi City.

A tangible cultural property, a historical material: an Aizen Myōō stone pagoda. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 2001-10-01. It is located in Fujioka-machi Fujioka, Tochigi City.

name_en: Hanging Bell Formerly Held by Enmeiin
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a historical material: a hanging bell (tsurigane) formerly held by Enmeiin. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 2003-02-01. It is located in Fujioka-machi Fujioka, within the Fujioka History and Folklore Museum, Tochigi City.

A tangible cultural property, a historical material: a lifting stone (chikaraishi). It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 2005-04-01. It is located in Fujioka-machi Heya, Tochigi City.

A tangible cultural property, a historical material: a black-seal letter (kokuinjō) of Tokugawa Hidetada. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 2003-09-11. It is located in Hanawada, Utsunomiya City, at the Tochigi Prefectural Archives.

name_en: Fief Grant Letter of Fujita Nobuyoshi
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a historical material: a fief grant letter (chigyō ategaijō) of Fujita Nobuyoshi. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 2003-09-11. It is located in Hanawada, Utsunomiya City, at the Tochigi Prefectural Archives.

name_en: Appointment Letter of Nishikata Tsunayoshi (Addressed to Watanabe Shirōbee)
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a historical material: an official appointment letter (kantojō) of Nishikata Tsunayoshi addressed to Watanabe Shirōbee. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 2003-09-11. It is located in Hanawada, Utsunomiya City, at the Tochigi Prefectural Archives.

name_en: Appointment Letter of Nishikata Tsunayoshi (Addressed to Nakaarai Mondonojō)
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a historical material: an official appointment letter (kantojō) of Nishikata Tsunayoshi addressed to Nakaarai Mondonojō. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 2003-09-11. It is located in Hanawada, Utsunomiya City, at the Tochigi Prefectural Archives.

A tangible cultural property, a historical material: a letter of Utsunomiya Kunitsuna. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 2009-02-11. It is located in Hanawada, Utsunomiya City, at the Tochigi Prefectural Archives.

A tangible cultural property, a historical material: a letter of Kōzan (Oyama Hidetsuna). It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 2009-02-11. It is located in Nishikata-machi Manako, Tochigi City.

name_romaji: Tokugawa Nariaki Hitsu Fukurodogaki (Nimen Tsui) Hakogaki-tsuki tsuketari "Mitokō Shindai Keishō" (Sakakura Jūhei-ke Monjo No.2890) Yonten
name_en: Calligraphy by Tokugawa Nariaki on Cabinet Doors, with Box Inscription and Related Documents (Four Items)
description_en: A tangible cultural property, a historical material: a paired set of cabinet-door writings by Tokugawa Nariaki with a box inscription, together with attached related documents from the Sakakura Jūhei family papers, comprising four items in total. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 2016-12-27. It is located in Yorozu-chō, Tochigi City.

A folk cultural property, a tangible folk festival float (dashi) of Ōmachi featuring Benkei. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 2001-01-22. It is located in Ōmachi, Tochigi City.

name_en: Festival Float of Izumichō (Admonishing Drum Rooster)
description_en: A folk cultural property, a tangible folk festival float (dashi) of Izumichō featuring the admonishing drum rooster (kankokei). It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 2001-01-22. It is located in Izumi-chō, Tochigi City.

name_romaji: Yamato-chō Itchōme no Shishigashira Ittsui tsuketari O Ittsui
name_en: Pair of Lion Heads of Yamato-chō 1-chōme, with a Pair of Tails
description_en: A folk cultural property, a tangible folk pair of lion-dance heads (shishigashira) of Yamato-chō 1-chōme, with an attached pair of tails. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 2001-01-22. It is located in Yorozu-chō, within the Tochigi Float Museum, Tochigi City.

A folk cultural property, a tangible folk festival float (dashi) of Kaemonchō featuring Emperor Nintoku. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 2001-05-24. It is located in Kaemon-chō, Tochigi City.

A folk cultural property, a tangible folk stone monument dedicated to Kakinomoto no Hitomaro. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1989-09-20. It is located in Ōhira-machi Nishiyamada, within the Ōhira History and Folklore Museum, Tochigi City.

name_en: Seated Statue of Batō Kannon Bodhisattva
description_en: A folk cultural property, a tangible folk seated statue of Batō Kannon Bodhisattva. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 2002-02-22. It is located in Ōhira-machi Shimotakashima, Tochigi City.

name_en: Roshinbō Monument and Rain-Prayer Thanksgiving Pagoda
description_en: A folk cultural property, a tangible folk Roshinbō monument and a rain-prayer thanksgiving pagoda (kiu shaon tō). It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 2009-04-01. It is located in Fujioka-machi Ōta, Tochigi City.

name_romaji: Kaminitta Fubasami-ryū Shishimai no Yōgu Isshiki
name_en: Complete Set of Implements for the Kaminitta Fubasami-Style Lion Dance
description_en: A folk cultural property, a tangible folk complete set of implements for the Fubasami-style lion dance of Kaminitta. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1982-01-11. It is located in Tsuga-machi Ienaka, Tochigi City.

name_romaji: Masuzuka Fubasami Ko-ryū Shishimai no Yōgu Isshiki
name_en: Complete Set of Implements for the Masuzuka Fubasami Minor-Style Lion Dance
description_en: A folk cultural property, a tangible folk complete set of implements for the Fubasami minor-style lion dance of Masuzuka. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 2005-05-03. It is located in Tsuga-machi Masuzuka, Tochigi City.

name_romaji: Shinmei Jinja no Mikoshi oyobi Sairei Yōgu Ikkatsu tsuketari Yōgu Shūnōbako Gogō, Komonjo Jūrokuten, Munafuda Nimai, Katsugibō Sanbon
name_en: Portable Shrine and Festival Implements of Shinmei Shrine, with Storage Boxes, Documents, Ridge Tablets, and Carrying Poles
description_en: A folk cultural property, a tangible folk set comprising the portable shrine (mikoshi) and festival implements of Shinmei Shrine, together with five storage boxes, sixteen old documents, two ridge tablets, and three carrying poles. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 2019-03-08. It is located in Kaemon-chō, Tochigi City.
A folk cultural property, an intangible folk lion dance (shishimai) of Ōmiya Shrine. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1961-12-21. It is located in Ōmiya-chō, Tochigi City.
A folk cultural property, an intangible folk kagura dance of Ōmiwa Shrine. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1964-05-19. It is located in Sōja-machi, Tochigi City.

A folk cultural property, an intangible folk halberd festival (hoko matsuri) of Ōmiwa Shrine. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1964-05-19. It is located in Sōja-machi, Tochigi City.

A folk cultural property, an intangible folk rite of floating one hundred and eight lanterns (hyakuhattō nagashi). It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1976-07-01. It is located in Minato-chō, Tochigi City.

A folk cultural property, intangible folk ritual customs (saigi shūzoku) of Miyanobe Shrine. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1984-03-30. It is located in Tamura-chō, Tochigi City.
A folk cultural property, an intangible folk song (Tomita bushi). It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1981-10-23. It is located in Ōhira-machi Tomita, Tochigi City.

A folk cultural property, an intangible folk daidai kagura dance of Yokobori. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1981-10-23. It is located in Ōhira-machi Yokobori, Tochigi City.

name_en: Kanda Five-Movement Festival Music of Shin
description_en: A folk cultural property, intangible folk Kanda five-movement festival music (godan bayashi) of Shin. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1981-10-23. It is located in Ōhira-machi Shin, Tochigi City.

A folk cultural property, an intangible folk Kanpaku-style lion dance (shishimai). It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1969-04-15. It is located in Tsuga-machi Ki, Tochigi City.

A folk cultural property, an intangible folk Fubasami minor-style lion dance (shishimai) of Masuzuka. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1974-10-01. It is located in Tsuga-machi Masuzuka, Tochigi City.

A folk cultural property, an intangible folk Fubasami-style lion dance (shishimai) of Kaminitta. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1982-10-15. It is located in Tsuga-machi Ienaka, Tochigi City.

A folk cultural property, an intangible folk Yoda-style daidai kagura dance of Washinomiya. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1991-05-17. It is located in Tsuga-machi Ienaka, Tochigi City.

A folk cultural property, an intangible folk daidai kagura dance of Ōsawada. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 2004-09-10. It is located in Nishikata-machi Honjō, Tochigi City.
A historic site known as Shimeji-ga-Hara. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1961-12-21. It is located in Kawarada-chō, Tochigi City.

name_en: Ancestral Mausoleum of the Minagawa Family
description_en: A historic site, the ancestral mausoleum (sobyō) of successive generations of the Minagawa family. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1961-12-21. It is located in Minagawa Jōnai-machi, Tochigi City.
A historic site, an ancient burial mound (kofun) at Iwade. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1961-12-21. It is located in Iwade-chō, Tochigi City.
A historic site, the Atagoshita burial mound (kofun) at Sonobe. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1961-12-21. It is located in Sonobe-chō, Tochigi City.
A historic site, the grave of Oyama Yoshihime. It is municipally designated by Tochigi City, designated on 1962-04-26. It is located in Hoshino-chō Kanzawa, Tochigi City.
